user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Consolidated Messenger.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-09 10:57 EST
Subject: Re: Re: executive brief Timeline

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about executive brief. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Sarah Singh <sarah.singh@consolidated.com>
Date: 2024-01-21 16:19 EST
Subject: URGENT: executive brief Issue at Consolidated Messenger

Thank you for the discussion last week. We'd like to move forward with executive brief. Can we schedule a call this week to finalize the timeline?

Meeting: executive brief Discussion - Consolidated Messenger
Date: 2024-01-14
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft), David (Consolidated Messenger)

[00:01:30] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into executive brief.

[00:05:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on technical validation and found that the migration can proceed in phases to reduce risk.

[00:10:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is data residency.

[00:12:00] David (Consolidated Messenger): On the executive brief front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around security compliance.

[00:14:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): The timeline for data residency is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:18:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is stakeholder alignment.

[00:22:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): Let me add some context -- we've been working on cost optimization and found that the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades.

[00:26:00] David (Consolidated Messenger): The timeline for cost optimization is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:29:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is budget approval.

[00:34:00] Sarah Singh (Consolidated Messenger): On the executive brief front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around timeline constraints.
